dashboard.label: Query Tester — Monitoring
dashboard.description: Operational dashboard for monitoring product usage, performance, errors, and scheduled runs.

search.query: index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" ("completed: status=" OR "Running scheduled test" OR "Test execution") earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | stats count
index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" "triggerType" "manual" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | stats count
index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" "Running scheduled test" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | stats count
index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" log_level=ERROR earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | stats count

index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | rex "user=(?<username>\w+)" | where isnotnull(username) | stats dc(username) as unique_users | eval unique_users=if(unique_users>0, unique_users, 0)

index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" "completed*duration=" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | rex "duration=(?<dur_ms>\d+)ms" | stats avg(dur_ms) as avg_duration | eval avg_duration=round(avg_duration, 0)

index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" ("completed: status=" OR "completed*duration=") earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | rex "status=(?<run_status>\w+)" | timechart count by run_status
index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" log_level=ERROR earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | timechart count as errors

index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" ("completed: status=" OR "completed*duration=") earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | rex "user=(?<username>\w+)" | where isnotnull(username) | stats count by username | sort - count | head 20
index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" "completed*status=" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | rex "status=(?<run_status>\w+)" | stats count by run_status

index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" ("Running scheduled test" OR "triggerType" OR "manual run") earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | eval trigger_type=case( like(_raw, "%Running scheduled test%"), "scheduled", like(_raw, "%manual%") OR like(_raw, "%triggerType%manual%"), "manual", 1=1, "other") | stats count by trigger_type

index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" "completed*duration=" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | rex "duration=(?<dur_ms>\d+)ms" | eval dur_bucket=case( dur_ms<1000, "0-1s", dur_ms<5000, "1-5s", dur_ms<15000, "5-15s", dur_ms<30000, "15-30s", dur_ms<60000, "30-60s", 1=1, "60s+") | stats count by dur_bucket | eval sort_order=case(dur_bucket="0-1s",1, dur_bucket="1-5s",2, dur_bucket="5-15s",3, dur_bucket="15-30s",4, dur_bucket="30-60s",5, dur_bucket="60s+",6) | sort sort_order | fields - sort_order

index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" "completed*duration=" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | rex "test (?<sched_id>[a-f0-9-]+) completed" | rex "testId=(?<test_id>[a-f0-9-]+)" | rex "status=(?<run_status>\w+)" | rex "duration=(?<dur_ms>\d+)ms" | eval dur_sec=round(dur_ms/1000, 1) | sort - dur_ms | head 10 | table _time sched_id test_id run_status dur_sec | rename sched_id as "Schedule ID", test_id as "Test ID", run_status as "Status", dur_sec as "Duration (s)"

index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" log_level=ERROR earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | rex "ERROR\s+-\s+(?<error_msg>.+)" | eval error_msg=substr(error_msg, 1, 120) | stats count by error_msg | sort - count | head 15 | rename error_msg as "Error Message", count as "Count"

index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" log_level=ERROR earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | rex "ERROR\s+(?<module>[\w.]+)\s+-" | stats count by module | sort - count | head 10

index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" ("Enqueued test" OR "Processing*queued" OR "Skipping*dedup" OR "Skipping*already running") earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | eval action=case( like(_raw, "%Enqueued test%"), "Enqueued", like(_raw, "%Processing%queued%"), "Processing", like(_raw, "%Skipping%dedup%") OR like(_raw, "%already running%") OR like(_raw, "%already ran recently%"), "Deduplicated", 1=1, "Other") | timechart count by action
index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" ("Skipping*dedup" OR "already running" OR "already ran recently") earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | stats count
index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" "Missed run detected" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | stats count
index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" "SPL drift detected" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | stats count
| inputlookup saved_tests_lookup | stats count by app | sort - count
| inputlookup saved_tests_lookup | eval type=case( validationType="ijump_alert", "iJump Alert", testType="query_only", "Real Data", 1=1, "Synthetic") | stats count by type
| inputlookup saved_tests_lookup | stats count by createdBy | sort - count | head 15

| inputlookup scheduled_tests_lookup | eval is_enabled=if(enabled="1" OR enabled="true" OR enabled="True", "Yes", "No") | table testName app cronSchedule is_enabled lastRunStatus lastRunAt | sort - lastRunAt | rename testName as "Test", cronSchedule as "Cron", is_enabled as "Enabled", lastRunStatus as "Last Status", lastRunAt as "Last Run"

| inputlookup test_run_history_lookup | sort - ranAt | head 50 | eval dur_sec=round(durationMs/1000, 1) | eval drift=if(splDriftDetected="true" OR splDriftDetected="1", "Yes", "No") | table ranAt ranBy triggerType status dur_sec drift resultSummary | rename ranAt as "Time", ranBy as "User", triggerType as "Trigger", status as "Status", dur_sec as "Duration (s)", drift as "SPL Drift", resultSummary as "Summary"
index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" log_level=ERROR earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | sort - _time | head 50

index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" ("send_failure_emails" OR "Failed to send email" OR "No valid recipients") earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | eval email_status=case( like(_raw, "%Failed to send email%"), "Failed", like(_raw, "%No valid recipients%"), "No Recipients", like(_raw, "%send_failure_emails%"), "Sent", 1=1, "Other") | timechart count by email_status

index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" ("LLM" OR "llm") earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | eval llm_status=case( like(_raw, "%LLM empty response%") OR like(_raw, "%LLM HTTP%"), "Error", like(_raw, "%LLM not configured%"), "Not Configured", like(_raw, "%LLM analysis failed%"), "Analysis Failed", 1=1, "OK") | timechart count by llm_status
